items.title: Arsenal’s pre-season plans revealed with 14 players on post-World Cup holidays, Marbella camp and old-school friendlies
items.summary: ARSENAL have officially started pre-season this week as they get ready to defend their Premier League crown. items.title: As Morgan Rogers calls Chelsea ‘biggest team in London’ SunSport argue whether Blues or Arsenal are really capital kings
items.summary: MORGAN ROGERS completed his record £117million transfer to Chelsea and immediately said he had joined the “biggest club in London”. items.title: Barcelona closing in on record-breaking Kerolin deal
items.summary: Barcelona are close to signing Brazilian forward Kerolin from Manchester City for a fee of €1.5m (£1.28m).

items.summary: ALEJANDRO GARNACHO is closing in on a loan move to Aston Villa after completing a medical.
